metadata.description: Non-vitamin supplements — botanicals, amino acids, adaptogens, fibers, omegas. Includes both flat list and health-category grouping.

supplements_flat.rationale: Excellent gas & cramping relief
supplements_flat.timing_in_protocol: Weeks 1+, before or in between meals

supplements_flat.rationale: Excellent for IBS-related cramping
Reduces pain & inflammation
Supports microbiota indirectly through anti-inflammatory effects. Piperine significantly enhances absorption.
supplements_flat.notes: 500-1000mg routine safe. Auto-add piperine at 1:100 ratio (5mg per 500mg curcumin). Display as 'Curcumin 500mg (+ 5mg Piperine)' — total weight = 505mg.

piperine_rule.note: Piperine is bundled with curcumin — NOT a separate component. Total weight = curcumin_mg + piperine_mg.

supplements_flat.rationale: Preferential - complete precursor, less redundancy
supplements_flat.notes: Indicated for athletes and active individuals (enhanced antioxidant need from oxidative stress). Also relevant for immune support, skin health, and longevity/aging goals.

supplements_flat.rationale: Can inhibit inflammatory markers
supplements_flat.notes: The recent patent of a product called AstraGin™, which contains both AM and Panax notoginseng extracts, has been approved for a novel food application by the European Commission

supplements_flat.rationale: Authoritative claim for cholesterol maintenance; is prebiotic; Oats are preferred, because then you don't have to consider gluten-intolerances.
supplements_flat.notes: RS3-like fermentation

supplements_flat.rationale: Authorized novel food; strongest evidence for LDL reduction
Multi-system support
supplements_flat.notes: Can have laxative side effects. Some studies report to have used up to 25 gram of powdered fenugreek. However too much fenugreek might also cause a drop in blood sugar for 'healthy' participants.

supplements_flat.rationale: Low-FODMAP fiber, gentle in sensitive patterns
supplements_flat.notes: RS3-like fermentation; can be combined with psyllium for enhanced efficacy

supplements_flat.rationale: Well-studied, take with adequate water; gold standard for constipation; benefits visible at 1-2 weeks
Use pure inulin if bifido target needed
supplements_flat.notes: May cause bloating initially; combine with psyllium if needed

supplements_flat.rationale: Concentration, memory, neurotransmitter synthesis
supplements_flat.notes: when using lectin granules, consider that the concentration of phosphatidyl choline ranges from 35-70%). Studies have also suggested a dosage up to 5 grams daily.

supplements_flat.rationale: Calm focus; pairs well with caffeine
supplements_flat.notes: Standard dose 200mg. For sleep-specific use, dose may be escalated to 400mg by rules engine when stress ≥7 AND sleep ≤5.

supplements_flat.rationale: Energy + vitality support
Fatigue + stress resilience
Energy + stress resilience
supplements_flat.notes: 1st choice when treating mental burnout fatigue.

supplements_flat.rationale: High caffeine content - monitor total intake
Essential oil fractions reduce gas production
Traditional use, aromatic carminative
supplements_flat.notes: synergizes with peppermint

supplements_flat.rationale: Well-tolerated, antispasmodic effect
Soluble fiber for fullness, excellent for IBS-C; needs adequate water
supplements_flat.notes: For immediate, physical satiety, Glucomannan is generally the superior choice. If the goal is a combination of reduced appetite and higher caloric burn, Capsicum Extract is more effective.

supplements_flat.rationale: Food additive (E415), generally safe, FODMAP consideration for IBS-D patients
Bee product (antibacterial/antiviral)
Antiviral, anti-inflammatory; 300-400mg for microbiome modulation, max 500mg/day
supplements_flat.notes: Nutritionist-confirmed dose range. Cautions: anticoagulants/antiplatelets → flag interaction; kidney disease → auto-exclude; pregnancy/breastfeeding → auto-exclude; multiple medications → flag for review.

pregnancy_breastfeeding.note: Do not add unless specifically cleared

supplements_flat.rationale: Energetic (bee product)
maintaining the structural integrity of brain cells and reducing inflammation; max 5g/day supplemental
supplements_flat.notes: In salt form

supplements_flat.rationale: Brain energy reserve; preliminary neuro evidence
pairing with probiotics can help polyphenol metabolism (synbiotic effect)
High linoleic acid, improves skin moisture
Good for skin UV-protection, and antiaging.
supplements_flat.notes: synergistic with collagen supplementation

supplements_flat.rationale: Powerful skin anti-inflammatory (for targeting inflammatory conditions (eczema/psoriasis))
Authorized health claim for sleep onset latency
Calm focus; cautious with caffeine at night (no morning grogginess)
supplements_flat.notes: promote the production of alpha brain waves, which are linked to a state of relaxed wakefulness, potentially making it easier to transition into sleep. Dose escalation: 400mg permitted when stress ≥7/10 AND sleep ≤5/10 (high arousal + severe sleep deficit). Supported by clinical studies using 200-400mg doses for sleep onset latency reduction. L-Theanine has GRAS status; doses up to 900mg/day are well-tolerated with no reported adverse effects.

supplements_flat.rationale: Powerful but can cause morning grogginess
Anxiety/sleep modulation; check thyroid interactions
Conditionally essential, immune-critical during stress
supplements_flat.notes: It helps repair the gut lining while supporting mental calmness.

supplements_flat.rationale: Energy + stress resilience
supplements_flat.notes: Best for someone experiencing burnout, mental fatigue, lack of concentration, or lethargy.

supplements_flat.rationale: Maintain normal triglycerides; max 5g/day supplemental
supplements_flat.notes: In salt form

supplements_flat.rationale: Amla has been shown to reduce serum triglyceride, LDL-cholesterol, and total cholesterol levels. It acts by managing lipid metabolism and has anti-atherosclerotic effects.
Polysaccharide + saponin support
Microbiome restoration
supplements_flat.notes: supports Akkermansia/Odoribacter growth; caution FODMAP sensitivity. Recommended is a combintation of FOS and GOS

supplements_flat.rationale: Microbiome restoration
supplements_flat.notes: Contraindications: Severe IBS‚ÄëD (may worsen diarrhea); active IBD flares; FODMAP sensitivity (GOS is FODMAP)

supplements_flat.rationale: Potent antioxidant; supports skin UV protection and eye health; anti-inflammatory; muscle recovery support
supplements_flat.notes: Part of fixed softgel formulation. Always co-administered with omega-3 and vitamin E.

polyphenol_classification.description: Polyphenol delivery classification for the polyphenol diversity rule

tier_1_capsule_shareable.description: Capsule-only (bitter/irritating) — can share evening capsule headroom
tier_1_capsule_shareable.notes: Fit into evening capsule headroom, divided among selected Tier 1 polyphenols

tier_2_dedicated_capsule.description: Capsule-only — too large to share, gets own dedicated capsule
tier_2_dedicated_capsule.notes: Each gets own morning capsule. Curcumin+piperine = 505mg min. Bergamot = 1000mg (size 00).

jar_safe.description: Mild taste — go in the powder jar (previously called sachet_safe)
jar_safe.notes: Budget = 1000mg - total_capsule_polyphenols. If budget is 0, no jar polyphenols.

supplements.rationale: Master antioxidant — reduces oxidative stress, supports cellular longevity, mitochondrial health, and immune resilience. First-line supplement for healthy aging goal.
supplements.notes: Triggered by longevity_healthy_aging goal. Complementary to Curcumin (anti-inflammatory) — both are included when longevity is a primary goal.

supplements.rationale: Reduces exercise-induced oxidative stress; supports muscle recovery and immune function in active individuals. Indicated for clients exercising ≥3x/week.
supplements.notes: Triggered by sport_recovery inferred signal (vigorous or moderate exercise ≥3 days/week).
